description: Pins instance_id-required, type-required, and the resize POST body. Both languages omit allow_auto_disk_resize and migration_type unless the caller sets them (the API applies its own defaults: allow_auto_disk_resize=true, migration_type=cold), so a minimal call sends just type. Explicit values are sent verbatim.

cases.name: resizes the instance with API defaults
resizes the instance with explicit options
requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This operation causes downtime and may affect billing. Set confirm=true to proceed.
